Video.summary: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.
Video.title: Melba Wilson: A Harlem Icon

Video.summary: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.
Video.title: Off-Grid Living: The Creative Space

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch takes on the science of transforming spaces.
Video.title: The Science Behind Kitchens & Bedrooms

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.
Video.title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Image.alt: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living
The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living
The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch breaks down the basic formulas for successful design.
Video.title: The Principles of Space Planning

Video.summary: Jillian learns how history inspires the future, touring boundary-pushing homes with a modern twist.
Video.title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Image.alt: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Video.summary: Jillian explores some of the most whimsical homes in Southern California.
Video.title: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes

Image.alt: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes
Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes
Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes

Video.summary: Matthew meets trailblazers Matthew McIvor of Proudly Serving and the King of Babka, Shimi Aaron.
Video.title: Burgers and Babka: Viral Sensations

Video.summary: Matthew meets Ethiopian-born Chef Fariyal Abdullahi and gets a hands-on lesson in creating Doro Wat.
Video.title: Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala

Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies joins the Paglias aboard their yacht Executive Decision for a deep-sea adventure.
Video.title: The Paglia's "Executive Decision"

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Andrea goes to Nashville to spend a day with Brad Rempel, lead singer of country music sensation High Valley.
Video.title: Brad Rempel's Country Music Cottage

Video.summary: Armed with fresh ideas, Charli and Kylie turn a forgotten attic into a welcoming flex room.
Video.title: Erin + Jesse: An Attic Transformed

Video.summary: Kylie and Charli bring smart solutions, bold materials, and thoughtful styling to a first home.
Video.title: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Image.alt: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Video.summary: Andrea lands in Upstate New York for pancakes, ping pong and plenty of fun with Nigel Barker.
Video.title: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home

Image.alt: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home
Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home
Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home

Video.summary: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.
Video.title: Meet the Neighbors

Video.summary: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.
Video.title: Place It & Plant It

Video.summary: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.
Video.title: Ultimate Upcycles

Video.summary: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.
Video.title: Backyard Builds

Video.summary: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.
Video.title: Mastering the Menu

Video.summary: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.
Video.title: Best on the Block

Video.summary: The Home Sort sisters transform spaces from chaos to clutter-free.

Video.summary: Andrea’s off to Huntington Beach, California to spend the day with Cassie Randolph.
Video.title: Cassie Randolph’s Beachside Bungalow

Video.summary: The Finn's are heading to the Texas backcountry to build their dream home off the grid.
Video.title: Going Off the Grid

Video.summary: With Builder Gary’s help, Leah’s hoping to get this house back on track.
Video.title: Let Go and Let Gary

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Corbels, Old Doors, & Cupolas

Video.summary: The mortar on the exterior stone is finally dry, but hasn’t turned out at all like Leah envisioned.
Video.title: Like Watching Mortar Dry

Video.summary: Leah focuses on interior selections, but choosing paint colors proves to be more difficult than she thought.
Video.title: Bring Your Daughter to Work Year

Image.alt: Bring Your Daughter to Work Year
Bring Your Daughter to Work Year
Bring Your Daughter to Work Year

Video.summary: With the end of the project in sight, everyone’s working hard to make sure the Finn's make their move-in date!
Video.title: The Final Push

Video.summary: Leah’s heard that the last 10% of the build takes 90% of the effort … and it couldn’t be more true.
Video.title: Making the Date

Video.summary: Andrea heads to Hollywood for smoothies and trivia with American Ninja Warrior's Matt Iseman.
Video.title: Matt Iseman’s Personal Paradise

Video.summary: Charli and Kylie transform Irene’s closet and turn her bedroom into a beautiful retreat.
Video.title: Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right
